candidateTopics.title: Platform Engineering Backstage Adoption in 2026
candidateTopics.summary: Teams are revisiting internal developer platforms to reduce cognitive load and deployment friction.
candidateTopics.whyTrendingNow: Multiple enterprises published platform ROI retrospectives this quarter.
candidateTopics.audienceResonance: Staff engineers, DevEx leads, and CTOs want measurable developer productivity gains.
candidateTopics.topicAngle: pragmatic rollout lessons vs platform theater

candidateTopics.title: AI Code Review Workflows for Pull Request Triage
candidateTopics.summary: Engineering teams are shifting AI from code generation toward risk-based PR triage and reviewer routing.
candidateTopics.whyTrendingNow: Recent tool updates improved severity prediction and merge confidence reporting.
candidateTopics.audienceResonance: Teams want shorter review cycles without sacrificing code quality.
candidateTopics.topicAngle: risk prediction beats generic auto-approve bots

candidateTopics.title: Kubernetes Cost Optimization After Autoscaling Spikes
candidateTopics.summary: FinOps and platform teams are revisiting autoscaling policies after sustained cloud spend surprises.
candidateTopics.whyTrendingNow: Several postmortems highlighted runaway background workloads and overprovisioned clusters.
candidateTopics.audienceResonance: Engineering managers and SREs need cost control without destabilizing reliability.
candidateTopics.topicAngle: reliability and spend guardrails in the same runbook

candidateTopics.title: OpenTelemetry Governance for Microservice Sprawl
candidateTopics.summary: As tracing adoption matures, teams are prioritizing telemetry governance over raw data volume.
candidateTopics.whyTrendingNow: Observability vendors and OSS maintainers released governance-focused updates and guidance.
candidateTopics.audienceResonance: Staff engineers care about signal quality, storage cost, and debuggability.
candidateTopics.topicAngle: less telemetry noise, faster root-cause analysis
